# openwrt-hotplug module
> Hotplug event subsystem: netifd-injected environment variables and /etc/hotplug.d/ script interfaces.
> **Total Context:** ~1412 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [map.md](./map.md): Structural map for openwrt-hotplug that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~497 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [bundled-reference.md](./bundled-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for openwrt-hotplug when a larger context window is available. (~1497 tokens, l4-monolith)

## Source Documents

- [hotplug_event-netifd-hotplug-events.md](./chunked-reference/hotplug_event-netifd-hotplug-events.md): Documents the standard hotplug event environment variables injected by OpenWrt's netifd and network subsystems into scripts in /etc/hotplug.d/. (~1412 tokens, l2-source)
